data.title: Worldcoin price expected to range between $0.48-$0.82, with critical $0.58 support test. Analysts predict $0.48 short-term, $0.82 by 2030.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Worldcoin is currently experiencing downward pressure, with analysts predicting a short-term decline to $0.48. However, long-term projections are more optimistic, with a forecast of $0.82 by the year 2030. The direction of Worldcoin's value will be influenced by critical support levels at $0.58.

data.title: Potential recovery for SUI: $1.70 short-term & $2.10 medium-term predicted despite recent 39% decline. Technical indicators suggest bullish momentum.
data.description: The projected price outlook for SUI indicates a possible rebound to $1.70 in the near future and $2.10 in the medium term. This forecast is supported by positive technical indicators suggesting a bullish trend, despite the recent fluctuations in the market.

data.title: Bitcoin treasury firms face tough competition as premiums drop, leverage backfires, and DAT stocks dip to discounts, Galaxy reports.
data.description: Bitcoin-focused treasury companies are facing a challenging period, described by Galaxy as a "Darwinian phase," due to collapsing equity premiums, increasing downside risks from leverage, and a shift in DAT stocks to discounts. This industry trend is highlighting the difficulties encountered by these entities in the current market environment.

data.title: Price outlook for OP: $0.24-$0.37 in 2-4 weeks with mixed signals till Dec 2025. Analysts bearish on OP.
data.description: An analysis on OP's price prediction suggests that it may fluctuate between $0.24 and $0.37 in the next 2 to 4 weeks. Although most analysts are bearish about it, the current technical analysis reveals a subtle bullish trend.

data.title: Predicting $0.24 rebound by mid-Dec 2025 for ARB, despite near-term weakness. Downside risk to $0.19 support.
data.description: Forecasts for ARB indicate a potential rebound to reach $0.24 in the coming two weeks, despite facing a current downside risk towards the $0.19 support level due to oversold conditions.

data.title: Oversold APT may bounce to $2.60 in 2 weeks, with RSI at 23.98 and support at $1.71. Resistance at $2.60-$2.90.
data.description: Predictions for the price of APT indicate a possible bounce back from an oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 23.98. Analysts are eyeing a resistance zone between $2.60 and $2.90 as Aptos struggles to maintain a crucial support level at $1.71. The market seems poised for a potential recovery following recent lows.

data.title: MemeMax extends MaxPack event due to 400% network surge, strong community participation.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea on December 6, 2025, MemeMax, the initial Perp DEX established in the MemeCore environment, has decided to prolong its 'MaxPack Airdrop Campaign' due to significant community involvement and a notable 400% increase in network transactions. The campaign, initially set to conclude on December 4th, has witnessed heightened activity with a surge in transactions.

data.title: NEAR forecast aims for $2.40 by December with $2.00 level critical for breakout, showing oversold conditions.
data.description: According to a recent price prediction, NEAR is anticipated to reach a target of $2.40 by December 31st, provided that bulls are able to surpass the $2.00 resistance level. Technical analysis indicates oversold conditions, suggesting a potential entry point for investors.

data.title: TRON aims for $0.30 breakout with bullish indicators predicting $0.30-$0.32 price range within 7-10 days.
data.description: Within the next 7 to 10 days, the price of TRX is expected to break out to a range between $0.30 and $0.32. This prediction is based on a bullish MACD divergence and the current position of the Bollinger Bands, indicating a continuation of upward momentum for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: LTC aims for $107 short-term, with potential rally to $138 by December 2025. Indicators show bullish momentum.
data.description: The cryptocurrency LTC is on the verge of testing a crucial support level at $107 before a potential surge of 71% to reach $138. Analyzing technical indicators shows conflicting signs, with a rise in bullish momentum despite the current slight downturn in the market.

data.title: Potential 7% rally as Cosmos aims $2.37 despite bearish trend, with $2.14 support critical for short-term direction.
data.description: Forecasting indicates that there is a possibility of ATOM experiencing an upturn to $2.37, even amidst ongoing bearish trends. The crucial support level at $2.14 will play a significant role in influencing the near-term trajectory of Cosmos.

data.title: Scatec's 273 MW Grootfontein solar plant in S Africa starts commercial operation under 20-yr PPA, ensuring reliable revenue.
data.description: In a recent development on December 6, 2025, Scatec ASA, a prominent renewable energy provider, has initiated the commercial activities of the Grootfontein solar power plant in South Africa. This plant boasts a capacity of 273 MW and is set to secure steady incomes through a 20-year power purchase agreement (PPA).

data.title: UNI price may hit $5.37 critical support, eyeing $7.88 target by Jan 2025. Oversold conditions hint at rebound.
data.description: Latest analysis on the UNI price indicates a crucial support level of $5.37, followed by a possible rebound towards a target of $7.88. Technical assessment suggests the market is currently oversold, which could pave the way for a potential recovery.

data.title: LINK predicted to reach $20.50 by Dec 2025, facing resistance at $14.50 in the near term. 50% potential upside projected.
data.description: According to recent price forecasts, Chainlink's LINK token could see a substantial 50% increase to reach $20.50 by December 2025. However, investors should be cautious as there is strong resistance at $14.50 currently, presenting a challenge for those bullish on Chainlink.

data.title: AVAX may hit $16-19 in 30 days with 20-43% increase despite current weakness, signals show oversold conditions.
data.description: The price forecast for AVAX suggests a possible increase of 20-43% to reach a range of $16-19 in the next 30 days. This prediction is based on oversold conditions indicated by technical indicators and the emergence of bullish MACD momentum.

data.title: Firm secures $1.44B amidst crypto downturn to ease investor concerns, with CEO mentioning extending dividend runway in 8 days.
data.description: Phong Le, the CEO of Strategy, revealed that his company was able to secure enough funds to cover 21 months' worth of dividends in a remarkable time span of only eight days. This proactive measure was taken to address concerns among investors and ensure stability within the firm.

data.title: Netflix acquired Warner Bros Discovery for $82.7 billion, focusing on AI and chips, not just movies. Otto says it involves Google's TPU chips in the future of entertainment.
data.description: The $82.7 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery by Netflix Inc. is not just about movies and shows, as stated by Melissa Otto from S&P Global Visible Alpha. The deal also focuses on artificial intelligence and chips. The impact of Alphabet Inc.'s technology ambitions, especially Google's TPU Chips, plays a significant role in shaping the future of entertainment. Otto highlighted that the key question revolves around the control of premium video on a large scale, with generative AI being used to create and personalize moving images. The full report is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: DOT price could surge to $2.75-$3.30 by Jan 2026. Technical analysis indicates a bounce from oversold levels with $1.96 support.
data.description: According to technical analysis, DOT is currently oversold and may see a bounce soon. There is a possibility that it could reach a resistance zone of $2.75-$3.30 in the next 4-6 weeks. It is crucial to note that the critical support level for DOT stands at $1.96.

data.title: Polygon (MATIC) set to rebound to $0.45, defying bearish trends - forecasted for December 2025. Support at $0.35 remains strong.
data.description: Analysts are forecasting a potential rebound for MATIC in the next 4-6 weeks, with the price expected to reach $0.45. Despite the current bearish trend, the crucial support level at $0.35 is expected to remain strong in the short term.

data.title: DOGE price could soar by 25-57% to hit $0.17-$0.22 as technical indicators suggest a breakout above $0.165 resistance.
data.description: The most recent forecast for DOGE suggests that Dogecoin is on track to surpass the $0.165 resistance level, with technical analysis indicating potential targets of $0.17 to $0.22 in the upcoming 2 to 4 weeks.
